style_effects: Flickering translucent purple aura pulses gently around the body, casting distorted reflections in the misty air; slow drifting mist particles swirl in an unnatural, spiraling motion, glowing faintly with eerie blue luminescence. The aura's color shifts between deep violet and pale ghostly white, intensifying with each subtle energy pulse visible through the Pokémon's semi-transparent form. Eerie purple ghost luminescence illuminates the surrounding area with a cold, ethereal glow, creating an atmosphere of stillness and unease. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
